narrative:
New Haven Township has 1,452 registered voters, with 58.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.5 percentage points.
